---
title: "Service"
toc: true
---

## Leadership

- **Treasurer**, CSE Graduate Student Association (CSEGSA), Texas A&M University  
  *(Oct 2025 – Present)*  
  - Managing budgeting and financial operations for graduate student programs  
  - Supporting organization of academic and community events  
  - Coordinating with university administration on funding and logistics  

---

## Community Service

- **Co-Founder**, Pothochari Foundation (Non-profit Organization)  
  *(2017 – 2022)*  
  - Organized fundraising initiatives to support flood-affected communities  
  - Led campaigns to distribute food, clothing, and essential supplies during major events (e.g., Eid)  
  - Coordinated volunteer efforts to provide aid to underserved and marginalized populations  

---

## Mentoring & Teaching

- Taught and mentored **300+ students** during undergraduate studies, preparing them for competitive university admission exams  
- Guided students in developing strong foundations in mathematics and problem solving  

---

## Awards & Honors

- **Dean’s Award for Academic Excellence**, Bangladesh University of Engineering and Technology (BUET)  
- **University Merit Scholarship**, BUET *(3× recipient)*  
- **RISE Research Grant**, BUET  
- **National Science Olympiad**, Winner *(3×)*  
- **National Physics Olympiad**, Winner *(2×)*  
- **National Math Olympiad**, 1st Runner-up  

<!-- ## Academic & Professional Service

<!-- Add later when applicable 

- Reviewer, Conference/Journal Name  
- Artifact Evaluation Committee Member, Conference Name   -->
